instruction: In ~/Desktop/archives_inbox, extract all .tar.gz and .zip files into ~/Desktop/extracted/. After extraction, classify the resulting files: move all .csv files into ~/Desktop/extracted/data/, all .txt files into ~/Desktop/extracted/docs/, and all .sh files into ~/Desktop/extracted/scripts/. Create ~/Desktop/extracted/summary.txt with three lines: csv=<count>, txt=<count>, sh=<count>.
source: 外部参考来源：Canonical tutorial - Command line for beginners (https://ubuntu.com/tutorials/command-line-for-beginners)

parameters.command:
rm -rf ~/Desktop/archives_inbox ~/Desktop/extracted; mkdir -p ~/Desktop/archives_inbox /tmp/arc_src; printf 'a,b,c
1,2,3
' > /tmp/arc_src/sales.csv; printf 'readme content
' > /tmp/arc_src/readme.txt; printf '#!/bin/bash
echo hi
' > /tmp/arc_src/deploy.sh; cd /tmp/arc_src && tar czf ~/Desktop/archives_inbox/bundle1.tar.gz sales.csv readme.txt; printf 'd,e,f
4,5,6
' > /tmp/arc_src/report.csv; printf 'notes here
' > /tmp/arc_src/notes.txt; printf '#!/bin/bash
echo bye
' > /tmp/arc_src/cleanup.sh; cd /tmp/arc_src && zip -q ~/Desktop/archives_inbox/bundle2.zip report.csv notes.txt cleanup.sh; rm -rf /tmp/arc_src

command: import pyautogui; import time; time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.click({SCREEN_WIDTH_HALF}, {SCREEN_HEIGHT_HALF}); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.hotkey('ctrl', 'alt', 't'); time.sleep(0.5)

result.command:
csv1='false'; [ -f ~/Desktop/extracted/data/sales.csv ] && csv1='true'; csv2='false'; [ -f ~/Desktop/extracted/data/report.csv ] && csv2='true'; txt1='false'; [ -f ~/Desktop/extracted/docs/readme.txt ] && txt1='true'; txt2='false'; [ -f ~/Desktop/extracted/docs/notes.txt ] && txt2='true'; sh1='false'; [ -f ~/Desktop/extracted/scripts/deploy.sh ] && sh1='true'; sh2='false'; [ -f ~/Desktop/extracted/scripts/cleanup.sh ] && sh2='true'; expected=$(printf 'csv=2
txt=2
sh=2
'); actual=$(cat ~/Desktop/extracted/summary.txt 2>/dev/null); summary_ok='false'; [ "$actual" = "$expected" ] && summary_ok='true'; echo "csv1=$csv1"; echo "csv2=$csv2"; echo "txt1=$txt1"; echo "txt2=$txt2"; echo "sh1=$sh1"; echo "sh2=$sh2"; echo "summary_ok=$summary_ok"
